function_or_component: calendar refresh warning / notifications pending
user_facing_symptom: Technical Google Calendar warning can appear in product alerts if web drains operator queue.
measurement_risk: Operator incident text can be misclassified as user-facing exposure.
suspected_root_cause: Shared queue family and /pending defaulting to openclaw.
reproduction_steps: Force calendar refresh failure for operator, open Today/Pulse, inspect alerts.
recommended_fix: Split endpoints or require explicit channel; keep diagnostics operator-only; short Settings warning only if user action needed.
recommended_test: Browser: calendar refresh failure appears in OpenClaw only, not web; Settings reconnect works.

function_or_component: timer overflow job
user_facing_symptom: Duplicate overflow alerts and raw float/user-hostile reply copy were observed.
measurement_risk: Timer overflow intervention lacks exposure accounting and dedupe separation.
suspected_root_cause: User and operator payloads share notification semantics; no output surface registration.
reproduction_steps: Run timer beyond planned+5; inspect web and operator alerts.
recommended_fix: Separate user/operator payloads; stable event ID; output surface render ack; integer formatting.
recommended_test: Backend + browser: one web toast, integer active min, no Reply copy, one operator alert.

function_or_component: missed plan mark done
user_facing_symptom: Re-entry showed mark-done for EXECUTED task then backend rejected.
measurement_risk: Stale cards can drive false recovery exposure and user action logs.
suspected_root_cause: Task range/evidence cache not invalidated on state transitions; frontend/backend eligibility drift.
reproduction_steps: Warm tasks range, execute task elsewhere, return to Pulse, click stale mark done.
recommended_fix: Bust range/evidence cache on all state changes; align eligibility; refetch before error.
recommended_test: Browser: executed task never remains in missed-plan queue after transition.

function_or_component: parked interruption chain
user_facing_symptom: Paused >72h after real overrun was marked skipped/retrospective-done instead of asking for reflection.
measurement_risk: Auto-recovered/repaired sessions can pollute execution/recovery measurements.
suspected_root_cause: Paused stale recovery resolved canonical state without user reflection; old row lacked dirty calibration flag.
reproduction_steps: Seed paused session aged >=72h, open Pulse, resolve with reflection.
recommended_fix: 72h+ paused sessions show Resolve session; focus/completion/scope required; close at paused_at; set data_quality_flag.
recommended_test: Backend: stale pause resolve endpoint; browser: old parked work opens reflection modal and disappears.

function_or_component: Pulse quick capture
user_facing_symptom: Live anchor is correct, but stale tutorial/docs still point brain-dump framing to Today.
measurement_risk: Low direct measurement risk; onboarding confusion can reduce capture data quality.
suspected_root_cause: Runtime moved to Pulse; old onboarding/tutorial copy remains.
reproduction_steps: Open /pulse#quick-capture and inspect scroll; search stale /today brain-dump copy.
recommended_fix: Keep runtime as-is; remove/mark stale Today brain-dump tutorial copy.
recommended_test: Browser: route from Today empty state to /pulse#quick-capture scrolls correctly.

function_or_component: Pressure Map can show Preview focus blocks in read-only pressure mode.
user_facing_symptom: Read-only/suppressed exposure condition can still mutate tasks.
measurement_risk: Frontend derives mutability from pressure items instead of backend recovery options.
suspected_root_cause: Enable LYRA_SAFE_MODE=read_only_pressure; seed pressure item; open Pulse; preview blocks.
reproduction_steps: Require explicit backend create_plan/split_into_blocks option before preview.
recommended_fix: Frontend test: items with recovery_options=[] render no preview/lock-in.

function_or_component: Card says Confirm coverage but Preview opens recovery plan.
user_facing_symptom: Provider/imported structure can become plan before confirmation.
measurement_risk: UI displays first option but action uses later create_plan option.
suspected_root_cause: Seed external deadline with coverage question; click Preview on Confirm coverage card.
reproduction_steps: Hide plan preview until coverage confirmation or render distinct create-plan card.
recommended_fix: Browser: confirm_coverage card cannot commit blocks before confirmation.

function_or_component: Partial brain-dump failures only show Got it.
user_facing_symptom: Failed messy obligations disappear or require manual retyping.
measurement_risk: Backend reports failures; frontend lacks retry/edit affordance.
suspected_root_cause: Commit one valid plus one invalid/past item; inspect failure review.
reproduction_steps: Add per-failure edit/retry/remove binding actions.
recommended_fix: Browser: failed item can be corrected and committed from review.

function_or_component: Pulse stop asks only FELT, not completion or scope.
user_facing_symptom: Pulse-led sessions miss completion_percentage/scope outcome.
measurement_risk: Pulse custom stop flow diverged from Today ReflectionModal.
suspected_root_cause: Start/stop from Pulse; inspect task_completion_percentage null.
reproduction_steps: Reuse ReflectionModal or add completion/scope fields in Pulse.
recommended_fix: Browser: Pulse stop saves 90 percent and scope_outcome.

function_or_component: Recovery block conflict dead-ends without create anyway.
user_facing_symptom: Dense schedules bias accepted recovery plans downward.
measurement_risk: Pressure commit path lacks standard soft-conflict override.
suspected_root_cause: Create planned task overlapping suggested recovery block; lock in plan.
reproduction_steps: Add row-level force create for soft conflicts.
recommended_fix: Browser: retry sends force=true and creates block.

function_or_component: Recovered stale paused session can become EXECUTED without execution timestamps.
user_facing_symptom: Deadline outcome and correction systems cannot locate execution interval.
measurement_risk: Recovery sets state/duration but not executed_start_utc/executed_end_utc.
suspected_root_cause: Age paused session past threshold; run stale recovery.
reproduction_steps: Set timestamps on recovered EXECUTED rows and mark dirty/auto-closed.
recommended_fix: Backend: recovered EXECUTED row has timestamps and clean exclusion.

function_or_component: Stale paused timers can remain open indefinitely if Redis still marks active.
user_facing_symptom: Open session remains live/recoverable forever; measurements stay incomplete.
measurement_risk: Recovery skips active_session_id before stale threshold logic.
suspected_root_cause: Pause task, keep Redis active key, age paused_at >48h, run recovery.
reproduction_steps: Recover Redis-active paused sessions beyond threshold and clear Redis atomically.
recommended_fix: Backend: active Redis stale pause is closed and keys cleared.

function_or_component: Stop/switch can write negative pause minutes under clock skew.
user_facing_symptom: Negative pause corrupts active duration and pause overhead.
measurement_risk: Resume clamps negative pauses; stop/switch/close helper do not share clamp.
suspected_root_cause: Set pause timestamp in future; stop or switch.
reproduction_steps: Shared clamp helper for resume/stop/switch/close.
recommended_fix: Backend: future pause on stop/switch writes non-negative duration.

function_or_component: Pulse can refetch after transition and still receive stale 60s state.
user_facing_symptom: Stale cards/totals/recovery prompts disagree with stopwatch truth.
measurement_risk: Range cache intentionally not busted on state transitions.
suspected_root_cause: Warm range cache; stop timer; refetch range.
reproduction_steps: Invalidate user ranges on all task/session state mutations.
recommended_fix: API/cache: stop busts range; browser: Pulse updates immediately.

function_or_component: Paused candidates can sort oldest first despite most-recent comment.
user_facing_symptom: Old stale parked work promoted over recently parked work.
measurement_risk: Sort uses paused_minutes descending and dedupe before deterministic order.
suspected_root_cause: Pause A two hours ago and B five minutes ago; inspect status.
reproduction_steps: Order by paused_at desc or paused_minutes asc before dedupe.
recommended_fix: Backend: two paused candidates order most recent first.

function_or_component: Stopping an interruption child can return wrong paused parent.
user_facing_symptom: Recovery toast can point to wrong task.
measurement_risk: Query picks any paused open session not current task.
suspected_root_cause: Have two paused sessions; stop child with known parent_task_id.
reproduction_steps: Prefer task.parent_task_id session, deterministic fallback.
recommended_fix: Backend: paused_parent is actual parent.

function_or_component: Starting while current timer is paused records interruption_type unknown.
user_facing_symptom: Context-switch/open-thread analytics overcount unknown interruptions.
measurement_risk: Paused-parent path bypasses interruption dialog/type selection.
suspected_root_cause: Start A, pause A, start B without type.
reproduction_steps: Require type or controlled value paused_context_switch.
recommended_fix: Backend/browser: paused start records explicit type.

function_or_component: Insights can render from dirty/retro/imported/auto-closed rows.
user_facing_symptom: Published insights overstate data validity.
measurement_risk: Endpoint reimplements eligibility and omits full Cortex clean-profile predicates.
suspected_root_cause: Seed dirty executed rows; call /analytics/insights.
reproduction_steps: Route insight task selection through shared clean-profile query.
recommended_fix: API: dirty rows do not trigger insights; browser suppresses card.

function_or_component: Create/edit estimate nudge can use dirty personal history.
user_facing_symptom: Calibration and occupancy suggestions become invalid.
measurement_risk: Lookup passes partially filtered tasks into blend without clean session provenance.
suspected_root_cause: Seed executed no-stopwatch/auto-closed overrun rows; call lookup.
reproduction_steps: Use planning_calibration_query plus exposure filtering.
recommended_fix: API: dirty rows cannot produce personal source nudge.

function_or_component: Deadline-shape stats can count repaired stale executions.
user_facing_symptom: Deadline-distance research claims become polluted.
measurement_risk: Outcome publication filters task state but not clean execution provenance.
suspected_root_cause: Create auto-closed deadline-bound executed task/outcome; call deadline-shape.
reproduction_steps: Gate reconciliation/publication through clean measured execution.
recommended_fix: Job/API tests exclude auto-closed/corrected outcomes.

function_or_component: bias_factor_observed can be negative for overrun.
user_facing_symptom: Downstream analysis can invert overrun/underrun semantics.
measurement_risk: Signed delta ratio named like canonical multiplier.
suspected_root_cause: Seed planned 60 executed 90; inspect deadline-shape field.
reproduction_steps: Rename to signed_delta_ratio_observed or add multiplier field.
recommended_fix: API asserts label/sign for overrun and underrun.

function_or_component: Archetype card can become ready from duration ratios without self-report evidence.
user_facing_symptom: Signal-target metadata does not match actual computation.
measurement_risk: Registry says readiness/reflection but service uses executed/planned ratios.
suspected_root_cause: Seed high-overrun tasks with no self-report; call archetype proximity.
reproduction_steps: Align registry targets or computation; use clean calibration query.
recommended_fix: API: dirty/no-self-report rows keep card settling_in.

function_or_component: Binding correction can attach task to completed/missed/skipped deadline.
user_facing_symptom: Post-hoc binding can attach execution truth to terminal obligation.
measurement_risk: Correction endpoint bypasses TaskManager bindable deadline validator.
suspected_root_cause: POST deadline-binding to completed deadline.
reproduction_steps: Reuse bindable validator or filter planned/active only.
recommended_fix: API rejects terminal deadlines; dialog omits terminal rows.

function_or_component: Moodle WS backfilled deadlines can look native.
user_facing_symptom: Users may treat external obligations as Lyra-native truth.
measurement_risk: Frontend checks exact moodle_ics source only.
suspected_root_cause: Seed moodle_ws_backfill deadline; view Today/Deadlines/Pulse.
reproduction_steps: Central provider display mapping; treat moodle* as external Moodle.
recommended_fix: Browser: moodle_ws_backfill shows Moodle/source badge.

function_or_component: Manual and imported same deadline can coexist.
user_facing_symptom: Pressure inflates; task attribution splits across duplicate obligations.
measurement_risk: External upsert only keys provider UID and does not collide with native duplicate guard.
suspected_root_cause: Create native deadline then import matching Moodle event.
reproduction_steps: Run native duplicate check on external create and surface/skip collision.
recommended_fix: Backend/browser: native/imported exact duplicate is prevented or warned.

function_or_component: Moodle connect can show Connected while sync.error exists.
user_facing_symptom: Connection exposure/support state counts degraded connection as success.
measurement_risk: Persisted connection success conflated with immediate sync success.
suspected_root_cause: Mock connect ok with sync.error http_500.
reproduction_steps: Render degraded warning and audit status degraded.
recommended_fix: Browser: sync.error returns warning not clean success.

function_or_component: Copy says auto-marks complete when submitted, but code also uses grade/sync-time fallback.
user_facing_symptom: Completion timing may be provider-reported or sync-time, not human completion.
measurement_risk: UI simplified external evidence into causal/temporal claim.
suspected_root_cause: Moodle grade without submit timestamp marks deadline completed at sync time.
reproduction_steps: Copy says Moodle reports submitted or graded; expose provenance.
recommended_fix: Snapshot/backend test for sync-time provenance visible.

function_or_component: Client can create attendance rows for arbitrary external_source.
user_facing_symptom: ExternalEventOutcome may not be actual Google Calendar self-report.
measurement_risk: API trusts extensibility field.
suspected_root_cause: POST attendance with fake_provider.
reproduction_steps: Constrain to google_calendar until more providers exist.
recommended_fix: API rejects non-Google source.

function_or_component: Pause/resume predictions can vanish without banner.
user_facing_symptom: False no-response/exposure windows.
measurement_risk: Queue lpop drains before render and Today status gates may block mount.
suspected_root_cause: Queue resume_prediction with mismatched status; load Today.
reproduction_steps: Use peek/reserve/ack; preserve unrendered predictions.
recommended_fix: Browser: mismatched notification is not lost.

function_or_component: Users on Pulse do not see queued notifications.
user_facing_symptom: Interventions enqueued but not exposed to user.
measurement_risk: Only Today polls pending notifications.
suspected_root_cause: Enqueue reminder/overflow, stay on Pulse.
reproduction_steps: Move host to app shell or add shared host.
recommended_fix: Browser: Pulse renders queued notification once.

function_or_component: None obvious; exposure records can disagree with actual UI.
user_facing_symptom: Exposure ledger overcounts unseen queued events and undercounts timer overflow.
measurement_risk: Workers log/queue decisions without client render ack; timer overflow not registered.
suspected_root_cause: Queue notification but do not render; inspect exposure rows.
reproduction_steps: Record decision at enqueue, render on client ack; register timer_overflow.
recommended_fix: Browser/API: render ack creates exposure exactly once.

function_or_component: Pause now can record intentional_break without explicit choice.
user_facing_symptom: Pause reason distributions contaminated by UI default.
measurement_risk: One-tap pause skips reason picker and sends default research field.
suspected_root_cause: Click primary pause from prediction or Pulse pause; inspect POST body.
reproduction_steps: Require explicit reason or label button as intentional break.
recommended_fix: Browser: pause reason sent only after explicit selection.

function_or_component: Operator receives high-volume redacted metadata for user notifications/render events.
user_facing_symptom: Operator stream becomes surveillance-shaped and biases product decisions.
measurement_risk: Mirroring default on and event-level rather than aggregate.
suspected_root_cause: Enable cohort traffic; inspect operator queue volume.
reproduction_steps: Default off for cohort or aggregate/sample operator notices.
recommended_fix: Backend: 20 user notifications produce max one aggregate.

function_or_component: Operator duplicates after restart/multi-process.
user_facing_symptom: Alert fatigue and weak operational signal.
measurement_risk: Cooldown stored in process memory.
suspected_root_cause: Send same operator alert before/after restart.
reproduction_steps: Redis SET NX EX dedupe by source/severity/key.
recommended_fix: Backend: two notifier instances queue one alert.

function_or_component: Future web caller can omit channel and drain openclaw queue.
user_facing_symptom: Internal alerts could leak or be consumed wrongly.
measurement_risk: /pending defaults to openclaw.
suspected_root_cause: Call /pending without channel from web token.
reproduction_steps: Split endpoints or require explicit channel.
recommended_fix: Endpoint missing channel returns 400; web helper uses web endpoint.

function_or_component: Signed-in user can make backend fetch private/local URLs.
user_facing_symptom: Hostile feeds can import bogus obligations and risk infra access.
measurement_risk: URL shape validation is not network safety validation; redirects followed.
suspected_root_cause: Preview/connect with localhost or metadata URL.
reproduction_steps: Reject private/link-local/loopback after DNS; HTTPS public runtime; redirect validation.
recommended_fix: API rejects localhost, RFC1918, 169.254.169.254, redirect-to-private.

function_or_component: Export omits deadlines, pauses, feedback, external outcomes, exposure, email engagement.
user_facing_symptom: Users cannot audit stored signals; privacy promises overstate export.
measurement_risk: Hand-curated export list lacks registry.
suspected_root_cause: Seed one row per user-owned table and export.
reproduction_steps: Central export/delete registry with redaction.
recommended_fix: Backend/browser: export includes all registry sections.

function_or_component: After delete, Redis notifications/timer/cache can remain.
user_facing_symptom: Deletion not complete; stale runtime state can reappear.
measurement_risk: DB purge does not purge runtime keys/backups.
suspected_root_cause: Seed Redis keys then delete account.
reproduction_steps: purge_user_runtime_state(uid) with known keys/patterns; align backup promise.
recommended_fix: Backend: delete removes notification, stopwatch, me, range keys.

function_or_component: Email open/click telemetry not exported/deleted clearly.
user_facing_symptom: Operational re-entry signals survive outside user-visible data surface.
measurement_risk: Email engagement added outside export/delete registry.
suspected_root_cause: Create EmailEngagementEvent; export/delete.
reproduction_steps: Decide retention; include/delete/anonymize per policy.
recommended_fix: Backend: email event export/delete policy asserted.

function_or_component: DB read exposes Google refresh tokens and Moodle iCal authtoken URLs.
user_facing_symptom: External calendar/LMS compromise risk.
measurement_risk: Fernet helper used for Moodle WS only, not Google/iCal.
suspected_root_cause: Connect Google/Moodle iCal; inspect stored columns.
reproduction_steps: Encrypt Google refresh tokens and Moodle iCal URLs with legacy fallback.
recommended_fix: Backend: stored values fernet-prefixed; legacy plaintext still works.

function_or_component: Any Google account can create a Lyra account.
user_facing_symptom: Unknown users contaminate controlled cohort assumptions.
measurement_risk: No invite/allowlist gate in NextAuth/backend provisioning.
suspected_root_cause: Sign in with arbitrary Google account.
reproduction_steps: Env allowlist or invite table in frontend and backend.
recommended_fix: Browser: non-allowlisted login rejected; allowlisted reaches app.
